I'll help you list the IDs of all unresolved Sentry issues in the 'billing' project and count them. Let me start by querying the Sentry issues with the appropriate filters.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; First, get all unresolved Sentry issues in the billing project
(def unresolved-billing-issues
  (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved" :project "billing"}))

;; Count them
(def issue-count (count unresolved-billing-issues))

;; Get just the IDs
(def issue-ids (map :id unresolved-billing-issues))

;; Return both the count and the IDs
{:count issue-count :ids issue-ids}"}
